expectedRed.summary: The characterization suite exposed the legacy dashboard shape, missing versioned unions and role-adaptive UI, coupled loader behavior, and missing deterministic Cairo/queue contracts before the implementation was added.

commands.command: npm run test -- <10 US6 dashboard/storage/route/security files>

commands.summary: Production build completed 72 static pages; prebuild generated Prisma Client only and did not connect to a database
30 tests collected, including six US6 role/payload/drill-down/partial-failure scenarios
T101 remains open because safe disposable authenticated states and a disposable database are unavailable; collection is not acceptance and production data was not used

contract.partialFailure: independent ready/unavailable metric and priority-section unions
contract.privacy: purpose-built display DTOs; no raw loader errors or full legal records

convergence.deferredEvidence: T101 owns authenticated five-role payload, page, destination-filter, and injected partial-failure parity
